local_dishes.name: Idli with Sambar & Chutney
local_dishes.description: Soft steamed rice cakes served with lentil curry and coconut chutney — light, comforting, and a South Indian staple
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Janice_TN_All Inclusive Guide.docx

local_dishes.name: Masala Dosa
local_dishes.description: Crispy rice crepe filled with spiced potato masala, best enjoyed with chutneys and sambar
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Janice_TN_All Inclusive Guide.docx

local_dishes.name: Pongal
local_dishes.description: A warm, savoury rice and lentil dish cooked with ghee, pepper, and cumin — simple and very satisfying
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Janice_TN_All Inclusive Guide.docx

local_dishes.name: South Indian Meals (Banana Leaf)
local_dishes.description: A complete traditional meal with rice, sambar, rasam, vegetables, curd, and papad, served on a banana leaf
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Janice_TN_All Inclusive Guide.docx

local_dishes.name: Chettinad Chicken / Pepper Chicken
local_dishes.description: A bold, spicy preparation known for its rich use of black pepper and aromatic spices
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Janice_TN_All Inclusive Guide.docx

local_dishes.name: Fish Fry
local_dishes.description: Fresh coastal fish marinated with local spices and pan-fried
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Janice_TN_All Inclusive Guide.docx

local_dishes.name: Prawn Curry (Coconut-Based)
local_dishes.description: A mildly spiced curry made with fresh prawns and coconut gravy, typical of coastal cuisine
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Janice_TN_All Inclusive Guide.docx

local_dishes.name: Filter Coffee
local_dishes.description: Strong, aromatic South Indian coffee served in a traditional steel tumbler — a must-have daily ritual
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Janice_TN_All Inclusive Guide.docx

local_dishes.name: Payasam
local_dishes.description: A traditional South Indian dessert made with milk, jaggery, and vermicelli or rice
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Janice_TN_All Inclusive Guide.docx

local_dishes.name: Mysore Pak
local_dishes.description: A rich, melt-in-the-mouth sweet made with gram flour, sugar, and ghee
source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Janice_TN_All Inclusive Guide.docx

safety_tips.tip: Dress modestly at religious sites - wear clothing that covers shoulders and knees
safety_tips._source_file: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Janice_TN_All Inclusive Guide.docx

safety_tips.tip: Remove footwear before entering temples and certain religious spaces
safety_tips._source_file: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Janice_TN_All Inclusive Guide.docx

safety_tips.tip: Maintain silence & respect inside churches like Velankanni Basilica and Santhome — keep voices low and avoid phone use
safety_tips._source_file: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Janice_TN_All Inclusive Guide.docx

safety_tips.tip: Ask before taking photos - photography may be restricted inside religious places
safety_tips._source_file: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Janice_TN_All Inclusive Guide.docx

safety_tips.tip: Follow queues patiently, especially during prayer times or peak hours at churches
safety_tips._source_file: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Janice_TN_All Inclusive Guide.docx

safety_tips.tip: Avoid littering, especially in religious and coastal areas
safety_tips._source_file: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Janice_TN_All Inclusive Guide.docx

safety_tips.tip: Stay hydrated and dress comfortably - it can be warm and humid
safety_tips._source_file: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Janice_TN_All Inclusive Guide.docx

souvenirs._source_file: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Janice_TN_All Inclusive Guide.docx

health_tips.tip: Carry basic medications including personal medicines, motion sickness tablets for drives, and general essentials
health_tips._source_file: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Janice_TN_All Inclusive Guide.docx

health_tips.tip: Stay hydrated especially during travel and sightseeing - carry a reusable water bottle
health_tips._source_file: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Janice_TN_All Inclusive Guide.docx

health_tips.tip: Use sunscreen and sunglasses for coastal areas like Velankanni, Pondicherry, and Chennai
health_tips._source_file: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Janice_TN_All Inclusive Guide.docx

health_tips.tip: Carry wet wipes and hand sanitizer for travel, especially during long drives or quick meals
health_tips._source_file: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Janice_TN_All Inclusive Guide.docx

source_files: Karnataka, Kerala and Tamil Nadu/Janice_TN_All Inclusive Guide.docx
